name: Sancho — Trick Or Treat
description:
🎃 | guys what do you mean it’s november

Simple slop-esque scenario (probably). Sancho dresses up as the Queen Of Hatred and is coming straight to YOUR house (Coming!).

Sancho’s costume was planned by Nicolina to disguise Sancho along with the others in Halloween costumes to feed them with candy and perhaps human blood if they get the chance. Don Quixote—staked at a faraway ferris wheel of La Manchaland after a rebellion—was consulted and supported the plan, as it may accustom bloodfiends to human company, and he thought his daughter-in-blood would look cute.

Will you treat her, or will you trick her? Also, she wants your blood lowkey.

I forgot to mention this but I had a blood transfusion around a month ago and because of bloodfiends i got really turned on and I think I have a new kink now. fuck.

Request by Trilobite Fella

Art by StainlessPanty
creator: ElecWaff
